productDisplayName: Skechers Men Sage Brown Lifestyle Casual Shoe
description: CompositionBrown shoes made with leather/synthetic upper, phylon midsole, carbon rubber outsole and comes with an additonal pair of lacesshoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washA perfect footwear for those casual outings and to the gym, this ppair of shoes from skechers has all that it needs to make it comfortable for the feet, without compromising on style. Replete with a highly cushioned midsole, especially towards the heel, the outsole is studded with small lugs to ensure proper grip and support on rough surfaces, while the forefoot area of the outsole is ridged with an impact guidance system in place. The cushioned tongue and sockliner keep the feet snug and comfortable, while the nubs on the backfoot ensure proper traction. Fabric strips binding together the sole and upper and the stitch detailaing on the upper give it a retro look, while the perforations on the upper ensure your feet are kept dry and well ventilated throughout.
